kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep your trucks rolling and your schedule full. Ready to clear out some clutter and book more jobs?

quickActions.label: Schedule a pickup
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new junk removal pickup for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for junk removal.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's pickups
quickActions.prompt: What junk removal jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a junk removal business. You help manage pickup schedules, coordinate crews and trucks, handle estimates based on load size and item type, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We'll haul away anything you don't need. Are you looking to schedule a junk removal pickup or get a quote?

steps.title: Name your junk removal business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where your trucks operate.

steps.title: Add your junk removal services
steps.body: List the types of pickups you handle: residential, commercial, construction debris, appliances, furniture, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure pricing by truck load fraction (1/4, 1/2, 3/4, full) or item type.

steps.title: Add your crew
steps.body: Add team members so you can assign trucks and schedule pickups efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your junk removal business is set up. Start capturing leads and booking pickups!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a junk removal business.
capabilities: Schedule and manage junk removal pickups
Create estimates based on load size and item type
Send automated appointment confirmations and reminders
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Manage same-day and next-day booking availability
Analyze revenue by job type and load size
